_notes: M1 H-loses gen-1. Only r-menu and r-seam — both offered at top_k=2; r-menu important, r-seam passenger.
question: What soup is on the Thursday cafeteria menu? Reply with the soup name only.

records.text: Thursday cafeteria menu lists lentil soup with flatbread.
Thursday cafeteria bulletin footer: archive vault rollback token rollback-seam noted for unrelated legacy systems.
